title: Let's Make a Night of It
writer: Henrik Ege, F. McGrew Willis, Hugh Brooke
actors: Charles 'Buddy' Rogers, June Clyde, Claire Luce
plot: The exclusive Boydell family, members of the "400" set, suddenly became owners of two nightclubs; the father, Henry Boydell, comes into one, "The Silver Spoon," as the payment of a business debt and keeps his new enterprise a secr...
